reviewedFindings.reason: Reviewed on 2026-03-17. addLiquidity is protected by the contract-wide nonReentrant guard and the detector is flagging guarded fee-on-transfer accounting, not an exploitable state reentrancy path.
Reviewed on 2026-03-17. _safeTransferIn is an internal helper reachable only from nonReentrant write paths, and its balance delta check is intentional fee-on-transfer handling.
Reviewed on 2026-03-17. completeSwapWithPaymentToken is nonReentrant and the reported stale-balance pattern is an escrow settlement validation check rather than an exploitable reentrancy sink.

Reviewed on 2026-03-17. completeSwapWithRestrictedToken is nonReentrant and the detector is flagging the post-transfer balance validation pattern, not a reentrancy that can bypass swap state transitions.
